zh.lifeSummary: 當Heinrich II von Nassau於大約1180年出生在德國海因里希_賀瑟-納斯奧武特拉可萊斯納斯奧時，他的父親Walram von Nassau I36歲，母親Kunigunde von Ziegenhain33歲。他於1215年與Mathilde von Geldern結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1251年1月25日在他的家鄉享年72歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Heinrich II von Nassau于大约1180年出生在德国海因里希_賀瑟-納斯奧武特拉可萊斯納斯奧时，他的父亲Walram von Nassau I36岁，母亲Kunigunde von Ziegenhain33岁。他于1215年与Mathilde von Geldern结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1251年1月25日在他的家乡享年72岁。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Nassau
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German, Dutch, and Jewish (western Ashkenazic): habitational name from the town of Nassau, formerly the seat of an independent duchy. The placename derives from Old High German naz ‘damp, wet’ + ouwa ‘water meadow’.

History: The royal house of Nassau traces its descent from Dudo, Count of Lauenburg, who flourished between 1093 and 1117. His family acquired the county of Nassau in the 12th century. Prince Willem van Oranje-Nassau, otherwise known as William the Silent (1533–84), was the leader of the Dutch revolt against Spain in the 16th century.

nameMeanings.name: Heinrich
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Henry
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Heinrich II von Nassau was born about 1180, in Nassau, Unterlahnkreis, Hesse-Nassau, Prussia, Germany, his father, Walram von Nassau I, was 36 and his mother, Kunigunde von Ziegenhain, was 33. He married Mathilde von Geldern in 1215. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 25 January 1251, in his hometown, at the age of 72.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Heinrich II von Nassau est né environ 1180, à Nassau, Unterlahnkreis, Hessen-Nassau, Prusse, Allemagne, son père, Walram von Nassau I, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Kunigunde von Ziegenhain, avait 33 ans. Il a épousé Mathilde von Geldern en 1215. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 25 janvier 1251, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 72 ans.

de.Nassau, Offenberg, Deggendorf, Bavaria,: Nassau, Offenberg, Landkreis Deggendorf, Bayern, Deutschland
de.lifeSummary: Als Heinrich II von Nassau um 1180 in Nassau, Unterlahnkreis, Hessen-Nassau, Preußen, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Walram von Nassau I 36 und seine Mutter Kunigunde von Ziegenhain 33. Er hat 1215 Mathilde von Geldern geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 25. Januar 1251 im Alter von 72 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Heinrich II von Nassau è nato il circa 1180 nel Nassau, Unterlahnkreis, Hessen-Nassau, Preußen, Germania, il suo padre, Walram von Nassau I, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Kunigunde von Ziegenhain, aveva 33 anni. Lui sposato Mathilde von Geldern nel 1215. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 25 gennaio 1251, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 72 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Heinrich II von Nassau(이)가 대략 1180년 독일 플레우ss 헤센-나소 운털라크레이스 나소에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Walram von Nassau I(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Kunigunde von Ziegenhain(은)는 33세였다. 그는 1215년 Mathilde von Geldern(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1251년 1월 25일 그의 고향에서 72세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Heinrich II von Nassau nasceu aproximadamente 1180, em Nassau, Unterlahnkreis, Hessen-Nassau, Preußen, Alemanha, seu pai, Walram von Nassau I, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Kunigunde von Ziegenhain, tinha 33 anos. ru.Nassau, Offenberg, Deggendorf, Bavaria,: нассау, оффенбирг, ландкрис дегендорф, беиирн, Германия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Heinrich II von Nassau родился около 1180 г. в местности нассау, унтирлахнкрис, хессен-нассау, Пруссия, Германия, его отцу по имени Walram von Nassau I было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Kunigunde von Ziegenhain, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Mathilde von Geldern в 1215 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер 25 января 1251 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 72 лет.

Se casó con Mathilde von Geldern en 1215. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 25 de enero de 1251, en su pueblo, a la edad de 72 años.
